title: network
description: One virtual network — AWS VPC, GCP VPC Network, Azure Virtual Network. The single cross-vendor shape policies use for flow-logging and default-VPC-removal checks.

id.description: Unique stable identifier (VPC ID, GCP network name, Azure VNet resource ID).

provider.description: Cloud provider short name: aws, gcp, azure.

is_default.description: This is the provider-created default VPC/network that should typically be unused in production.

cidr_block.description: Primary CIDR block of the network.
